component.name: Sonata
component.summary: Desktop player for the Apple Music web app

description.p: Sonata is an unofficial desktop player for the Apple Music web app, with full DRM playback support via Widevine. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Apple Inc.; "Apple Music" is a trademark of Apple Inc.
Features:

ul.li: Floating mini player with album art, progress bar, and volume
Time-synced lyrics in a separate window
Dark mode that follows your desktop theme
Last.fm scrobbling and Discord Rich Presence

screenshot.caption: The mini player and time-synced lyrics window

description.p: Each window (main, mini player, lyrics) now remembers its own position separately on KDE Wayland, via KWin scripting — reliably, where the previous rule-based approach failed for the main window.
Update restart now reliably relaunches into the new version by starting it in a clean session environment (the inherited environment was crashing the new instance).
On KDE Wayland, window positions are now remembered across sessions (via a KWin rule) — the one thing Wayland won't let an app do on its own.
"Restart Now" after an update now reliably relaunches into the new version, waiting for the old instance to fully exit and falling back to extract-and-run if needed.
The app-menu entry now uses a stable symlink so it never breaks after an update. The mini player's Always on Top toggle also pins the lyrics window.
Fixed a crash during self-update: the updater no longer deletes the running AppImage (which caused a SIGBUS); old versions are pruned safely on the next launch.
Adaptive album color — the mini player and lyrics window retint to the current album art. The lyrics window now stays on top on KDE Wayland.
Updates install under the new version's file name and restart cleanly, without crashing the replaced instance.
The settings window shows the app version.
Only one copy of the app runs at a time — launching it again surfaces the running window instead of opening another instance.

The AppImage now installs itself into the app menu on first run and keeps itself up to date: new releases are downloaded and verified in the background, with a notification to restart into the new version.
Tray icon tooltip shows the current track and artist; the mini player gained an Always on Top toggle in its ⋯ menu, working on KDE Wayland via KWin.
Track-change notifications, a settings window, launch-at-login and close-to-tray, remembered window sizes, and a refined Nebula visualizer.
Audio-reactive visualizer with four scenes (Bars, Aurora, Nebula, Toast) and synced lyrics.
Packaging and runtime updates.
Packaging: AUR package; store screenshot and metadata.
Rebranded to Sonata with a new icon. Mini player favorites, explicit badge, and hover times.
Security hardening.
Mini player, synced lyrics window, Discord Rich Presence, and Last.fm scrobbling.
